purpose: Craft examples for second-chance revenge, future knowledge pressure, corrected choices, and source-grounded payoff reversals.
source_priority_rules: Source text and locked payload outrank this example pack.
Use examples only to shape regret, foreknowledge, and reversal timing.
Do not invent future memories, hidden crimes, or new relationships unless the source supports them.
genre_boundary: Show what the character remembers, what they change, and what pressure returns because of that change.
Keep the revenge logic readable through visible choice rather than vague destiny language.
Do not flatten the scene into a generic comeback speech.

scene_card_examples.visual: The locked lead recognizes a source-grounded moment from the previous life and stops the old mistake before it repeats.
scene_card_examples.voiceover: The point of rebirth is not memory alone; it is the changed choice under the same pressure.

asset_goal.purpose: same place, changed choice, visible pressure return

script_scene_examples.visual: The lead uses one known future detail to reverse the room's power balance without revealing every hidden fact.
script_scene_examples.voiceover: A second chance matters only if the consequence changes this time.

dialogue.speaker: locked lead
dialogue.line: I will not repeat that mistake.

script_scene_examples.action_result: The previous-life pressure turns into a visible present advantage or warning.

dialogue_style_examples: Use lines that carry memory, restraint, and a specific corrective choice.
Avoid explaining the whole prior life when one present action can prove it.

negative_examples.bad: Add random prophetic powers or unsupported villains just to make the revenge bigger.
negative_examples.why_bad: It breaks source causality and turns rebirth into arbitrary escalation.

forbidden_drift: Do not swap lead character identity, role hierarchy, or speaker authority without source support.
Do not introduce a new prop, letter, poison, ledger, or weapon unless the source seeds it.
Do not change room, route, threshold, or blocking position without a visible causal bridge.
Do not alter relationship status, knowledge state, or alliance state without source support.
Do not change cause and effect so the rebirth advantage appears unsupported.

image: Lock the repeated location anchor, the corrective gesture, and the object that proves the changed choice.
video: Preserve continuity between remembered pressure, present action, and the new state created by the reversal.
